FLOW.COMMENT: vfSessionSetStatus - set the current status of the session

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: z_incrementActiveDeliveryAttempts - increment the number of attempts to deliver this document

MAP.COMMENT: UPDATE TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE SET DELIVERY_ATTEMPTS=DELIVERY_ATTEMPTS+1 WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

Values.value: UPDATE TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE SET DELIVERY_ATTEMPTS=DELIVERY_ATTEMPTS+1 WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

INVOKE.NAME: sRows <> 1
INVOKE.COMMENT: Warning: unable to update TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE, sRows='%sRows%'

Values.value: Warning: unable to update TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE, sRows='%sRows%'

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT DELIVERY_ATTEMPTS FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

Values.value: SELECT DELIVERY_ATTEMPTS FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

INVOKE.NAME: sRows <> 1
INVOKE.COMMENT: Warning: unable to update TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE, sRows='%sRows%'

Values.value: Warning: unable to update TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE, sRows='%sRows%'
